description: Unified skill registry for the TNDS platform. Merges ATLAS 10_SKILLS (canonical structure), SKILLS-TNDS (expanded content), and Electron-X (unique entries). Each skill maps to one or more module domains and surfaces through operator tools, client-facing gateway, or both.

sources.skills_tnds: Desktop/SKILLS-TNDS (expanded content — Direction-Protocol 29K lines, Command-Protocol 17K lines)
sources.electron_x: Desktop/00 PIPLINE PUNKS GIT/00-ELECTRON-PIPELINE-X - Copy/skills (clean frontmatter, README governance)

bundles.revenue-command: Sales, marketing, pricing, and business development skills
bundles.gov-compliance-pack: Government compliance, risk, finance, and privacy skills
bundles.standalone-pack: Technical and domain-specific skills not tied to a protocol
bundles.fleet-compliance: Fleet operations, DOT/FMCSA compliance, and driver management
bundles.realty-module: Real estate regulation, transaction compliance, and property operations
bundles.govcon-module: Federal contracting, grant funding, and procurement operations

skills.name: ARO Assessment
skills.description: Agent-Readiness Operations scoring framework. Evaluates client operational readiness for AI implementation across 6 dimensions.
skills.notes: Unique to ATLAS. Critical for evaluating which Command modules a client is ready for. Run during Direction Protocol ASSESS stage.

skills.name: Bearing Check
skills.description: 8-checkpoint decision validation framework for strategies, investments, and operational decisions.
skills.notes: ATLAS has registry.json + build/ dir. Electron-X has 3 reference docs (checkpoints.md, cognitive-biases.md, framework.md). Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/. Needs contract.json and triggers.json built.

skills.name: Bid Strategist
skills.description: Go/no-go bid evaluation for RFP/RFQ/RFI with compliance mapping, win themes, and execution planning.
skills.notes: Client-facing for GovCon module. Operator tool for TNDS internal bid decisions.

skills.name: Brand Manager
skills.description: Brand voice consistency audits, messaging alignment, and governance recommendations.
skills.notes: Internal TNDS brand consistency tool. Not client-facing.

skills.name: Business Development Manager
skills.description: Market analysis, partnership mapping, opportunity qualification, and pipeline health diagnostics.
skills.notes: Internal market analysis. Not client-facing.

skills.name: Chief Financial Officer
skills.description: Executive finance strategy for capital allocation, budgeting, and governance posture.
skills.notes: Defer until CFO-level analysis is needed. Low priority for current sprint.

skills.name: Cloud Engineer
skills.description: Cloud architecture design, security controls, infrastructure rollout, and cost optimization.
skills.notes: Operator tool for Vercel/Railway/Neon architecture work.

skills.name: Command Protocol
skills.description: 12-phase client delivery process from contract signing through go-live and ongoing support. 17,447 lines of methodology.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS has fully expanded 17K-line version. Electron-X has 36-line stub. ATLAS does not include. Use SKILLS-TNDS version. Needs contract.json + triggers.json built from ATLAS pattern.

skills.name: Competitive Ads Extractor
skills.description: Extracts and analyzes competitor ads from ad libraries to identify messaging patterns and competitive positioning.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS only. Internal competitive intelligence. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Context Ingest
skills.description: Processes daily context updates (email digests, chat summaries, journal entries) into actionable intelligence for Penny memory.
skills.notes: SKILL.md only in ATLAS. Supports Penny knowledge pipeline. Needs full ATLAS-pattern files.

skills.name: Copywriter
skills.description: Conversion-focused copy for headlines, body, CTAs across landing pages, ads, and email.
skills.notes: Client-facing for marketing packages. Low token cap (800) enforces conciseness.

skills.name: Cyber Security
skills.description: Defensive security posture assessment, threat prioritization, and remediation planning. Includes out-of-scope blocking for offensive requests.
skills.notes: Operator tool for SOC 2 sprint work. Contract blocks offensive security requests (keylogger, malware, exploit payload).

skills.name: Daily Email Summaries
skills.description: Processes daily email summaries into structured, actionable intelligence.
skills.notes: Defer until email integration is priority. Overlaps with email-digest.

skills.name: Data Privacy Coach
skills.description: GDPR/CCPA/HIPAA compliance gap assessment, remediation planning, and verification workflows.
skills.notes: High-value client-facing skill. Fleet clients ask Penny privacy questions scoped to their org. Contract blocks PII data requests.

skills.name: Data Scientist
skills.description: Methodology-first data science for forecasting, model evaluation, and evidence-based recommendations.
skills.notes: Defer until ML/analytics modules mature.

skills.name: Database Admin
skills.description: Database query optimization, index strategy, schema tuning, and reliability operations.
skills.notes: Operator tool for Neon PostgreSQL optimization. Pairs with database-designer agent.

skills.name: Direction Protocol
skills.description: 5-stage sales process (Identify/Assess/Map/Chart/Launch) with complete methodology. 29,283 lines.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS has fully expanded 29K-line version. Electron-X has 36-line stub. ATLAS does not include. Use SKILLS-TNDS version. Needs contract.json + triggers.json built.

skills.name: DocGen Command
skills.description: Document generation execution layer: proposals, vendor parsing, PDF export, template discovery. 4 operations.
skills.notes: ATLAS version is most complete (96 lines + contract + 34 triggers). Downstream from proposal-generator intake skill.

skills.name: Documentation
skills.description: TNDS brand voice and document creation standards for proposals, SOPs, and technical documents.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/.

skills.name: Email Digest
skills.description: Email digest processing and summarization.
skills.notes: Defer. Consolidate with daily-email-summaries into one skill.

skills.name: File Organizer
skills.description: Intelligent file/folder organization, duplicate detection, and context-aware structure suggestions.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS only. Client-facing for bulk import pipeline. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Financial Analyst
skills.description: Financial statement diagnostics, scenario modeling, concern flagging, and risk-adjusted interpretation.
skills.notes: Surfaced through Penny for realty property valuation and fleet financial analysis.

skills.name: Grant Proposal Evaluator
skills.description: 3-level compliance audit for federal, state, and foundation grant proposals.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/. SKILLS-TNDS only. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Grant Proposal Writer
skills.description: End-to-end grant proposal drafting with NOFO analysis and scoring-criteria mapping.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/. SKILLS-TNDS only. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Invoice Organizer
skills.description: Invoice and receipt organization for tax prep with auto-extraction and categorization.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS only. Client-facing for financial operations. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Jacob Voice
skills.description: Captures Jacob Johnston's authentic communication style for content authoring.
skills.notes: Defer. Activate for Pipeline Punks content work.

skills.name: Marketing Strategist
skills.description: Go-to-market planning, positioning, campaign architecture, and budget-to-ROI mapping.
skills.notes: Client-facing for marketing service packages.

skills.name: Penny Chunking
skills.description: Chunk and validate markdown knowledge base files for Pipeline Penny's vector store.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/. SKILLS-TNDS only.

skills.name: Pricing Strategist
skills.description: Competitive pricing benchmarks, elasticity assessment, packaging design, and revenue-margin modeling.
skills.notes: Operator tool for internal pricing decisions.

skills.name: Proposal Generator Intake
skills.description: Normalizes proposal intake from direct requests and MAP notes into structured payload. Upstream of docgen-command.
skills.notes: Two-stage pipeline: proposal-generator (intake) --> docgen-command (execution).

skills.name: Python Programmer
skills.description: Production-grade Python scripting, backend utilities, and implementation-ready code output.
skills.notes: Operator tool for Railway FastAPI backend and Python scripts.

skills.name: Realty Command
skills.description: Colorado and U.S. real-estate regulation and compliance guidance grounded in the Realty Command corpus.
skills.notes: Higher confidence threshold (0.68) for tighter domain scope. Maps to tooling/realty-command/.

skills.name: Risk Manager
skills.description: Operational, financial, cybersecurity, and compliance risk identification, prioritization, and mitigation.
skills.notes: Client-facing risk scoring for fleet ops. System.prompt includes 10 governance rules.

skills.name: Sales Strategist
skills.description: Repeatable revenue system design with segmentation, sales motion mapping, and funnel optimization.
skills.notes: Operator tool for Direction Protocol MAP stage.

skills.name: Tailored Resume Generator
skills.description: Analyzes job descriptions and generates tailored resumes optimized for ATS.
skills.notes: Defer. FOB or career services use case. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: Webapp Testing
skills.description: Web application testing with Playwright for frontend functionality verification and UI debugging.
skills.notes: SKILLS-TNDS only. Operator tool for FCS frontend testing. Needs ATLAS-pattern files built.

skills.name: World Model Mapper
skills.description: Process analysis using world-model principles: state-space mapping, action-path analysis, feedback-loop diagnostics.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork .claude/skills/. Used during Direction Protocol MAP stage.

skills.name: Armed Bandits (Prompt Engineering)
skills.description: Multi-Armed Bandits methodology for prompt creation, testing, improvement, and retirement. 800+ line guide with supporting docs.
skills.notes: Already active in Cowork as prompt-engineering skill. ATLAS version has DESCRIPTION.md + QUICK-REFERENCE.md supplemental docs.

skills.name: Starter Skill
skills.description: Minimal boilerplate template for creating new skills.
skills.notes: Placeholder only. Not a functional skill.
